case_title: DEBRA J. DOLCH VS. RICHARD GRABSTEIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-10-2021 CONTINUED TO OCT-19-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
